mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CARD_EVENT_LOGS (log_id, card_id, action_detail, result_code, error_message) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{cardId, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{actionDetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{resultCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{errorMessage, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} )

SELECT SEQ_EVENT_LOGS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO EVENT_LOGS (log_id, event_type, event_status, user_id, request_ip, duration_ms) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{eventType, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{eventStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{userId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{requestIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{durationMs, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )

INSERT INTO TERMS_EVENT_LOGS (log_id, terms_id, action_detail, error_message) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{termsId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{actionDetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{errorMessage, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} )

INSERT INTO CHAT_EVENT_LOGS (log_id, session_id, query_text, qdrant_hit_count, top_score, used_fallback, error_message) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{sessionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{queryText, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{qdrantHitCount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{topScore, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{usedFallback, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{errorMessage, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} )
